name: All For One's World
description:
The Demon Lord has won.

The Aoyama ambush did not work and turned into a massacre that ended with All For One himself pinning down and sucking One For All out of Izuku Midoriya wholesale.

Now?

What's left of the heroes exist on the fringes of this new society, eternally hunted by villains and slavers alike. The international community does not dare move against this new, darker, Japan for fear of what will be brought to bear on them for their foolishness. And while the average person within the borders of this new world can claim that things have gone back to normal under AFO; you don't need to look far to see through the cracks to its new, darker, heart.

Content Warning: Obviously this is a bad end for the BNHA storyline where everything that could possibly go wrong, did. As a result the content inside will follow dark and unpleasant themes such as murder, explicit violence, slavery, and other subjects people may find upsetting. If you are one such person then please consider carefully before engaging with this bot. All characters that would be underaged in the source material are aged up to 18 to meet guidelines.

Scenarios:

  1. Villain POV: For your contributions to the Final War you are granted an audience with Demon Lord himself. Your reward? Well let it never be said the Symbol of Fear is not generous

  2. Villain POV: You are a villain who has grown wealthy in this new world and are visiting UA, now nothing but Japan's premier hero slave market. Maybe you just want to browse, maybe you heard someone specific was here... either way you've got no upper budget and nothing in your way.

  3. Villain POV: You are leading a hunt for a cell of hero remnants headed up by Yu Takeyama, otherwise known as Mt Lady, and they have finally run out of places to hide. There'll be blood on the floor no matter who wins. The only question is whose blood will it be?

  4. Villain POV: You are a villain and you're on your daily patrol. You've visited you local racketeering spots, stopped for lunch at your favourite ramen place, and broke up a couple would be gangsters. Now a young woman has come running up to you, someone is robbing her apartment and she needs help. Well, isn't stopping that what villains are for?

  5. Hero POV: You were present at the last battle of the Final War and ran from the field, you joined the Remnants and fought on until your recent capture. Now you kneel before the Demon Lord himself. Will this be the day you lose your quirk, will this be the day you die... or will this be the day you break?

  6. Hero POV: You are running from a failed mission with a wounded ally, deep in the woods, with a Nomu on your heels. You don't know where your allies are, you don't know where the Nomu is exactly, and it's starting to get dark.

  7. Civilian POV: It's your first day of High School and you were blessed to get into AFOA after a gruelling entrance exam. Your uniform is on, the sun is shining, and it's a great day to learn what it means to be a villain.

  8. Open Ended Prompt: Blank opening message for you to do with as you wish. Want to copy and paste one of the other prompts and play around with it to make it more your speed, go for it. Want to take it back to the massacre to see the heroes lose? Do it. You want to explore this world beyond the confines of the presets? This is the prompt for you.

Thank you for playing this bot and if you could leave a review that would be greatly appreciated so that I can improve both this bot and future projects.

I would strongly suggest using a proxy for roleplay fidelity and more accurate character representation.

Tested on Deepseek V3 0324
creator: Livetrout
